notes: Evals re-run 2026-04-24 via skill-creator simulation (read-only general-purpose subagents). 6 subagent runs (3 evals × with_skill + without_skill). Benchmark: with_skill 85% vs without_skill 87% (delta -0.02). Finding: two eval expectation mismatches — (1) archive-complete expects auto-PR but skill treats PR as a manual next step; (2) block-incomplete expects /opsx-apply suggestion but skill says 'go back and complete tasks'. Both are low-priority fixes. See evals/workspace/iteration-1/benchmark.md.

runs.method: skill-creator simulation (read-only general-purpose subagent, no Edit/Write)

assertions.note: Step 2 runs openspec status --json to check required vs optional artifacts; Step 3 checks task completion.

assertions.id: syncs delta specs to main specs
assertions.note: Step 4 shows combined diff, prompts, then executes /opsx-sync logic.

assertions.id: converts test cases to reusable scenarios
assertions.note: Step 4.5 parses TC-N headers from test-plan.md, offers multi-select, converts to TS-NNN-<slug>.md files.
SKILL GAP: no automatic PR creation. /create-pr listed as Step 8 'What's next' option only — not executed by skill.
Step 7 reads plan.json for tracking_issue, asks via AskUserQuestion, closes via update_issue if confirmed.
Step 3 Case B reads tasks.md, detects unchecked '- [ ]' items.
'⛔ Cannot archive: N task(s) still incomplete: - Task X: <title>' lists by name.
MISMATCH: skill offers 'Go back and complete tasks' or 'Archive anyway (override)' — does NOT name /opsx-apply. Fix: add 'run /opsx-apply to complete remaining tasks' to Case B message.
Blocks; only proceeds on explicit user override.

assertions.id: applies ADDED requirements to main specs
assertions.note: Detected and shown in combined diff; /opsx-sync inserts new requirements.
Listed in combined diff; /opsx-sync updates existing entries.
Listed in combined diff; /opsx-sync handles deletion.

assertions.id: preserves existing content not mentioned in delta
assertions.note: Implied by scope-limited sync — only listed changes applied.

runs.notes: All sync behaviors delegated to /opsx-sync. Archive skill is a discovery + prompt + handoff wrapper.
